list.name: Changes
list.comment:
feat: add `created_at` ordering for trips and routes queries
- Updated `supabase-trip.repository` and `supabase-route.repository` to sort results by `created_at` in descending order before other criteria.

task.summary:
fix: resolve RLS recursion issue, improve email confirmation flow
- Fixed infinite recursion in RLS policies by introducing `current_user_role()` as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function to avoid self-referential queries. - Moved `current_user_role()` to an internal schema to restrict API exposure. - Updated RLS policies to reference the internal role helper. - Enabled email confirmation in Supabase config to align with updated authentication flow. - Enhanced user registration feedback and adjusted related repository and use-case logic for email confirmation handling.

feat: add theme toggle, improve UI consistency with new design tokens
- Introduced a theme toggle component for light/dark mode switching with localStorage support. - Updated UI elements and forms to use consistent design tokens for colors, borders, and backgrounds. - Applied a professional palette derived from the UBBS crest. - Enhanced the header with logo support and integrated theme toggle. - Improved error handling for password reset requests with rate-limiting feedback.

feat: implement booking and waitlist flow with seat selection
- Introduced seat reservation and waitlist actions for trip bookings. - Added UI for seat maps, booking details, and payment panels. - Integrated booking confirmation, cancellation, and waitlist management with real-time updates. - Implemented backend support for getting occupied seats and trip seat maps. - Seeded data with deterministic, idempotent routes and trips for testing.

fix: update UUIDs in seed data to ensure RFC-4122 v4 compliance
- Adjusted route and trip UUIDs to conform to RFC-4122 version 4 standard. - Updated comments to highlight validation requirements for UUIDs. - Ensured consistency for seeded data with idempotent operations.

feat: add admin features for managing trips and routes
- Implemented create, update, and cancel actions for trips using server actions. - Introduced UI for listing, editing, and creating trips and routes in the admin area. - Added defensive checks to ensure only admins can access or perform actions. - Integrated real-time revalidation for admin routes and trips. - Enhanced user feedback with status messages for operation success or failure.

refactor: relax validation for loop routes in create-route use case
- Removed restriction preventing origin and destination from being the same. - Updated validation to only check for non-blank origin and destination values. - Clarified comments to reflect intent behind updated validation logic.

feat: add user role management to admin area
- Introduced UI for listing users and modifying roles within the admin area. - Implemented backend use cases for listing users and changing roles with defensive validations. - Added server actions to ensure only admins can make role changes. - Integrated real-time revalidation of admin user list after role updates.

feat: implement admin user management hierarchy and invitation system
- Added SQL migration to enforce admin hierarchy with scoped management rules. - Introduced a service-role client for server-only admin operations requiring RLS bypass. - Implemented invitation flow for promoting users to admins via email. - Created use cases for deleting, updating, and inviting users with defensive checks. - Updated admin UI to support hierarchical user management. - Enhanced user feedback for invitation, deletion, and update actions.

feat: enhance invite system and admin user management
- Added use cases for listing and resending admin invitations. - Updated invite flow to generate copyable invitation links instead of sending emails directly. - Enriched admin UI with email and invite status overlays. - Improved invite error handling with specific errors for failed or accepted invites. - Introduced "Resend invite" functionality for pending invitations.

feat: introduce reusable UI components and improve trip management
- Added reusable components: Badge, Button, Card, and Container for consistent UI. - Updated trip list to display imagery, badges, and interactive cards. - Enhanced admin user management with hierarchical invite roles. - Refactored "invite" functionality to support custom roles and reusable logic. - Improved user table with clearer role, status, and management options.

feat: redesign admin layout and add SiteBackground component
- Added `AdminNav` for consistent tab navigation in admin sections. - Redesigned admin layout with improved structure and updated headings. - Introduced `SiteBackground` for a decorative page background across all routes. - Refined trip and route pages with reusable components (e.g., `Container`, `Badge`, `Card`, `Button`). - Improved UI consistency by aligning styles and spacing across admin and main pages.

feat: add MobileMenu and SiteFooter components for improved navigation and layout
- Introduced `MobileMenu` for responsive navigation in the signed-in header (mobile-first design). - Added `SiteFooter` with UBBS branding, links, contact info, and developer credit. - Updated `layout.tsx` to include `SiteFooter` for consistent site-wide usability. - Enhanced `SiteHeader` to support both desktop and mobile navigation.

feat: implement staff check-in system with QR code scanning and manual entry
- Added `check_in_booking` SQL function to handle staff QR-based ticket check-in with role validation and robust error handling. - Built `/staff/check-in` page for ticket scanning with jsQR integration and manual code entry fallback. - Introduced typed domain errors for precise check-in failure messages. - Implemented `CheckInScanner` component for camera integration, ticket validation, and real-time feedback. - Enhanced navigation with a new "Check-in" link for staff in the `MobileMenu` and defensive checks in `proxy.ts` for staff routes.

feat: add staff trip roster with boarding management
- Added `get_trip_roster` SQL function to generate per-trip boarding rosters for staff/admin with role-based access control. - Built `/staff/trips` UI to display trip boarding rosters, with manual check-in functionality. - Introduced `RosterTable` component for visualizing boarding status and managing actions. - Enhanced trip and booking entities to handle boarding status and display "Boarded" metadata. - Updated navigation to include a "Trips" section under the staff area.

feat: enhance mobile and staff navigation, improve QR handling
- Updated `MobileMenu` and `SiteHeader` to include a new "Boarding" link for staff navigation. - Added proper transitions in `CheckInScanner` to handle programmatic `dispatch` calls cleanly. - Adjusted `.gitignore` to exclude certificates for better environment management.

feat: add admin dashboard analytics and bulk invite support
- Added `get_admin_dashboard` SQL function for admin-only revenue, demand, and occupancy analytics. - Introduced a new admin dashboard UI for visualizing trip performance, route metrics, and 14-day trends. - Implemented an all-or-nothing bulk invite system for uploading and validating .csv/.xlsx files. - Enhanced invite validation with detailed error reporting and template file generation. - Included `xlsx` package for spreadsheet processing.

feat: add `created_at` ordering for trips and routes queries
- Updated `supabase-trip.repository` and `supabase-route.repository` to sort results by `created_at` in descending order before other criteria.

MESSAGE.value:
fix: resolve RLS recursion issue, improve email confirmation flow
- Fixed infinite recursion in RLS policies by introducing `current_user_role()` as a `SECURITY DEFINER` function to avoid self-referential queries. - Moved `current_user_role()` to an internal schema to restrict API exposure. - Updated RLS policies to reference the internal role helper. - Enabled email confirmation in Supabase config to align with updated authentication flow. - Enhanced user registration feedback and adjusted related repository and use-case logic for email confirmation handling.

feat: add theme toggle, improve UI consistency with new design tokens
- Introduced a theme toggle component for light/dark mode switching with localStorage support. - Updated UI elements and forms to use consistent design tokens for colors, borders, and backgrounds. - Applied a professional palette derived from the UBBS crest. - Enhanced the header with logo support and integrated theme toggle. - Improved error handling for password reset requests with rate-limiting feedback.

feat: implement booking and waitlist flow with seat selection
- Introduced seat reservation and waitlist actions for trip bookings. - Added UI for seat maps, booking details, and payment panels. - Integrated booking confirmation, cancellation, and waitlist management with real-time updates. - Implemented backend support for getting occupied seats and trip seat maps. - Seeded data with deterministic, idempotent routes and trips for testing.

fix: update UUIDs in seed data to ensure RFC-4122 v4 compliance
- Adjusted route and trip UUIDs to conform to RFC-4122 version 4 standard. - Updated comments to highlight validation requirements for UUIDs. - Ensured consistency for seeded data with idempotent operations.

feat: add admin features for managing trips and routes
- Implemented create, update, and cancel actions for trips using server actions. - Introduced UI for listing, editing, and creating trips and routes in the admin area. - Added defensive checks to ensure only admins can access or perform actions. - Integrated real-time revalidation for admin routes and trips. - Enhanced user feedback with status messages for operation success or failure.

refactor: relax validation for loop routes in create-route use case
- Removed restriction preventing origin and destination from being the same. - Updated validation to only check for non-blank origin and destination values. - Clarified comments to reflect intent behind updated validation logic.

feat: add user role management to admin area
- Introduced UI for listing users and modifying roles within the admin area. - Implemented backend use cases for listing users and changing roles with defensive validations. - Added server actions to ensure only admins can make role changes. - Integrated real-time revalidation of admin user list after role updates.

feat: implement admin user management hierarchy and invitation system
- Added SQL migration to enforce admin hierarchy with scoped management rules. - Introduced a service-role client for server-only admin operations requiring RLS bypass. - Implemented invitation flow for promoting users to admins via email. - Created use cases for deleting, updating, and inviting users with defensive checks. - Updated admin UI to support hierarchical user management. - Enhanced user feedback for invitation, deletion, and update actions.

feat: enhance admin invitation and user management system
- Added use cases for listing and resending admin invitations. - Enriched user data with email and invite status for the admin user page. - Updated `SupabaseInviteRepository` to support invite state retrieval and link generation. - Improved invite handling with new error types for accepted or failed invites. - Refined admin user list with real-time invite status and email overlays.

feat: enhance invite system and admin user management
- Added use cases for listing and resending admin invitations. - Updated invite flow to generate copyable invitation links instead of sending emails directly. - Enriched admin UI with email and invite status overlays. - Improved invite error handling with specific errors for failed or accepted invites. - Introduced "Resend invite" functionality for pending invitations.

feat: introduce reusable UI components and improve trip management
- Added reusable components: Badge, Button, Card, and Container for consistent UI. - Updated trip list to display imagery, badges, and interactive cards. - Enhanced admin user management with hierarchical invite roles. - Refactored "invite" functionality to support custom roles and reusable logic. - Improved user table with clearer role, status, and management options.

feat: add admin navigation and site-wide background components
- Implemented `AdminNav` component with pill tab navigation for admin sections. - Introduced `SiteBackground` component with decorative SVG and CSS gradient background for all routes.

feat: enhance admin layout and introduce reusable components
- Added `AdminNav` and `SiteBackground` components for better navigation and design consistency. - Updated admin layout to use reusable `Container` and `AdminNav` components. - Improved trip and route listing styles with enhanced readability and structure. - Refined UI elements with consistent design tokens and reusable classes.

feat: redesign admin layout and add SiteBackground component
- Added `AdminNav` for consistent tab navigation in admin sections. - Redesigned admin layout with improved structure and updated headings. - Introduced `SiteBackground` for a decorative page background across all routes. - Refined trip and route pages with reusable components (e.g., `Container`, `Badge`, `Card`, `Button`). - Improved UI consistency by aligning styles and spacing across admin and main pages.

feat: add mobile menu and site footer components
- Implemented `MobileMenu` for responsive small-screen navigation. - Added `SiteFooter` with explore links, client contact, and developer credit. - Updated `SiteHeader` to integrate the mobile menu and improve responsiveness.

feat: add MobileMenu and SiteFooter components for improved navigation and layout
- Introduced `MobileMenu` for responsive navigation in the signed-in header (mobile-first design). - Added `SiteFooter` with UBBS branding, links, contact info, and developer credit. - Updated `layout.tsx` to include `SiteFooter` for consistent site-wide usability. - Enhanced `SiteHeader` to support both desktop and mobile navigation.

feat: implement staff check-in system with QR code scanning and manual entry
- Added `check_in_booking` SQL function to handle staff QR-based ticket check-in with role validation and robust error handling. - Built `/staff/check-in` page for ticket scanning with jsQR integration and manual code entry fallback. - Introduced typed domain errors for precise check-in failure messages. - Implemented `CheckInScanner` component for camera integration, ticket validation, and real-time feedback. - Enhanced navigation with a new "Check-in" link for staff in the `MobileMenu` and defensive checks in `proxy.ts` for staff routes.

feat: add staff trip roster with boarding management
- Added `get_trip_roster` SQL function to generate per-trip boarding rosters for staff/admin with role-based access control. - Built `/staff/trips` UI to display trip boarding rosters, with manual check-in functionality. - Introduced `RosterTable` component for visualizing boarding status and managing actions. - Enhanced trip and booking entities to handle boarding status and display "Boarded" metadata. - Updated navigation to include a "Trips" section under the staff area.

feat: enhance mobile and staff navigation, improve QR handling
- Updated `MobileMenu` and `SiteHeader` to include a new "Boarding" link for staff navigation. - Added proper transitions in `CheckInScanner` to handle programmatic `dispatch` calls cleanly. - Adjusted `.gitignore` to exclude certificates for better environment management.

feat: add admin dashboard analytics and bulk invite support
- Added `get_admin_dashboard` SQL function for admin-only revenue, demand, and occupancy analytics. - Introduced a new admin dashboard UI for visualizing trip performance, route metrics, and 14-day trends. - Implemented an all-or-nothing bulk invite system for uploading and validating .csv/.xlsx files. - Enhanced invite validation with detailed error reporting and template file generation. - Included `xlsx` package for spreadsheet processing.

feat: add `created_at` ordering for trips and routes queries
- Updated `supabase-trip.repository` and `supabase-route.repository` to sort results by `created_at` in descending order before other criteria.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
feat: add `created_at` ordering for trips and routes queries
- Updated `supabase-trip.repository` and `supabase-route.repository` to sort results by `created_at` in descending order before other criteria.
